heading: Kenduskeag Stream, Penobscot County, Maine
label: 59p Kenduskeag Stream, Penobscot County, Maine
text: The Kenduskeag Stream, a minor tributary of the Penobscot River, located in Penobscot County, in the State of Maine, be, and the same is hereby, declared to be a nonnavigable waterway within the meaning of the Constitution and laws of the United States of America.The right of Congress to alter, amend, or repeal this section is hereby expressly reserved.
